_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Register systems with organizational program management offices
reference_document_element_description: Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by applicable data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and AI system registrations.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.422), DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.539). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [management, offices, organizational, program, register, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.859, R=0.835). P exceeds R by 0.024 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Register systems with organizational program management offices" and "Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.461 < STS 0.539 (gap -0.077). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [management, offices, organizational] and [ai, applicable, appointments] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [management, offices, organizational, program, register, systems]. WIDAI terms: [ai, applicable, appointments, data, dpo, filings].
